name: alert@tinaforminnesota.com
subject: BREAKING: Housley predicts two point Republican win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Friend, we can't sit back.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-november?refcode=rtw_20181103PM_em-B&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") **_Marshall Independent_ : "Housley predicts two-point win"** Don't let Republicans flip this seat red. Fight back: **[Donate](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-november?refcode=rtw_20181103PM_em-B&amount=10&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** Friend, we can't sit back. From our opponent: _" On the ground here there is a lot of excitement, more so than in 2016. Those people who are quiet Republicans that voted Republican and didn't tell anybody are now coming out and telling people," Housley said. "We didn't have crowds like this in 2016."_ Donald Trump came within 1.5 points of winning Minnesota in 2016, now our Republican opponent is saying his base is _even more_ fired up this year. If you want a true progressive in this Senate seat we cannot afford to let up this close to Election Day. **Please rush an urgent contribution so we can get out every vote and take on the Republican enthusiasm building on the other side:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d2de/c1f7015/6e53d06b/1140aff7/3932300944/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLW5vdmVtYmVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJydHdfMjAxODExMDNQTV9lbS1CIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-november?refcode=rtw_20181103PM_em-B-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

name: Blue Pennsylvania
subject: Bob needs your help RIGHT NOW (PA-SEN)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7c76/51dbcc2a/16ed91dd/3aca1be/3047063139/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Team -- we're almost done.

In just three days Pennsylvania voters will head to the polls and decide whether or not to re-elect Bob. With so little time left to go, we can't afford to fall short now. In the last few weeks we've seen Bob's opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta, outraise Bob and make his largest ad buy to date.

_**[There's a lot on the line, and we can't afford to fall short at the end. Losing Bob would be catastrophic for PA -- can you chip in $5 or whatever you can right now to help?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181103_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**_

The NRA just spent tens of thousands of dollars contacting Pennsylvania voters, so it's absolutely crucial to get Bob the resources to set the record straight. Voters deserve to know the truth -- that Bob has always fought for them, for their families and for their communities -- before they go into voting booths on Tuesday.

**This campaign is almost done and we have to make sure that Bob's in a good position heading into these final hours. Donors are standing by to match your gifts this weekend. What can you donate right now to help him?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 (Becomes $10)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181103_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 (Becomes $50)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181103_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")** **[Donate $50 (Becomes $100)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181103_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181103_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

Thanks.

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181103_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: URGENT@SherrodBrown.com
subject: sorry, but we have bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | **According to a new poll, Sherrod has lost ground.** We'll be frank with you Peter: too many people think we have this race locked up, but our opponent is surging in the polls. **This is NOT the time to be losing ground** \-- but according to a new poll, this single-digit race is only getting closer. | | | [Donate](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd31/4462dc26/76131f65/201f1e5f/1046233457/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAzeiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181103z?refcode=sbe181103z_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
Jim Renacci and special interest groups are attacking Sherrod with nasty attacks. Trump's coming to town AGAIN on Monday.
We're sorry to bother you Peter, but this really can't wait. [**We need to raise another $3,100 to reach our GOTV goal before midnight to help turn out the vote.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd31/4462dc26/76131f65/201f1e5f/1046233457/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAzeiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181103z?refcode=sbe181103z_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
[**Will you rush in a contribution? All gifts that come in before midnight will be TRIPLED.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd31/4462dc26/76131f65/201f1e5f/1046233457/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAzeiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181103z?refcode=sbe181103z_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd31/4462dc26/76131f65/201f1e5e/1046233457/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAzeiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181103z?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe181103z_m_5&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd31/4462dc26/76131f65/201f1e5e/1046233457/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAzeiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIxMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181103z?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe181103z_m_10&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd31/4462dc26/76131f65/201f1e5e/1046233457/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAzeiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181103z?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe181103z_m_26&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd31/4462dc26/76131f65/201f1e5f/1046233457/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAzeiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181103z?refcode=sbe181103z_m_other&refcode2=3268183")**
This is a single-digit race. With less than a week before Election Day, every single dollar matters.
Sherrod wants nothing more than to continue his work, fighting like hell for Ohio families in the Senate. But the other side is pulling out all the stops to defeat him.
We have to do the same if we want to keep him where he is.
[**Peter, give what you can. Whatever you can give will have triple the impact.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd31/4462dc26/76131f65/201f1e5f/1046233457/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAzeiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181103z?refcode=sbe181103z_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

Team Sherrod

name: Team O'Halleran
subject: endorsement alert!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
We've been crazy busy with our get-out-the-vote efforts this week here at Team O'Halleran. But we're excited to pause and share some great news: The Arizona Republic's editorial board endorsed Tom's r
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633dc8/1a8421e1/19bbbd410/497c73cf/2532365709/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Friends, We've been crazy busy with our get-out-the-vote efforts this week here at Team O'Halleran. But we're excited to pause and share some great news: **The _Arizona Republic_ 's editorial board endorsed Tom for re-election!** Take a look at their kind words about Tom's work on behalf of our community, [**_and then make a donation to re-elect him!_**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b3_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") [](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b3_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") We're very proud of this endorsement, friends. It confirms what we've known all along: Tom is the independent voice we need standing up for us in Congress, while Wendy Rogers is a right-wing extremist. The choice in this race is extremely clear. [**Please do chip in to support our campaign if you can**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b3_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") \-- the election is only 3 days away, and we can't take anything for granted! Thanks, Team O'Halleran | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b3_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**

name: Our Revolution
subject: The political revolution is on your ballot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
Friends,
This election is our chance to reshape the political system in this country. Our Revolution endorsed **Ben Jealous** for governor of Maryland, **Jamie Raskin** for the United States House of Representatives, and **Marc Elrich** for Montgomery County Executive, and if every single one of us turns out to vote, we can prove that Big Organizing will win out against Big Money -- but we cannot do this without you.
[**Click here to double check where to vote this Tuesday, November 6.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a743/bed43eb/8de87eaa/75fc40ed/1726341387/VEsH/ "https://gttp.votinginfoproject.org/")
Once you find out where to vote, forward this email and help us spread the word far and wide.
A democracy means one person, one vote. If we work together, stand up, and organize, we can reclaim our democracy from the corporate donors and special interests. We will prove, once and for all, that when working families come together, there is nothing we cannot accomplish.
This Tuesday, let's get out and vote and show the world the power of Our Revolution.
In solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a743/bed43eb/8de87eaa/75fc40ef/1726341387/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a743/bed43eb/8de87eaa/75fc40ee/1726341387/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a743/bed43eb/8de87eaa/75fc40e9/1726341387/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

subject: Last chance to Early Vote! ☑️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/TLWVeP4GGKa1P9SQeRCvi1MmK6NM12PprCv5qxpVrPw=/1ZuHcCdEVxdCqjD6Y8vGDsJrj5Ols5G9OFthy_n5gPc=) Friends and Neighbors -- From the Panhandle to the Everglades, Jeremy Ring has been traveling across our beautiful state, talking to voters about **his forward thinking, innovative vision, one that features an innovation driven economy ready made for the 21st century and vital checks and balances to our state and federal government. **

This is the kind of vision we need in our state cabinet - and the vision Jeremy would lead with as our next Chief Financial Officer (CFO). **With just 48 hours left until Election Day,** we are almost at the end of this race. **And today is the very last day of Early Voting in Florida!**

**Early Voting dates vary by location, but _end no later than today._ [Please click here for your local Early Voting information.](https://act.myngp.com/el/TLWVeP4GGKa1P9SQeRCvi1MmK6NM12PprCv5qxpVrPw=/ZEr2x8nvWctTFtLHVm1Z-AtZ6y-CfZXUCs6opKacAeA=)**

Early Voting dates vary by location, but end no later than today. = It all comes down to these last hours. I want to make sure you have everything you need for the most important part of this campaign - casting your VOTE - and hopefully avoiding the long lines on Tuesday by Early Voting today! = Your vote will make the difference between our state moving forward with a fresh vision like Jeremy 's - or continuing with the same tired - and failed - status quo that our current CFO and state leadership represent. So please, = Thank you for everything you've done and are doing, Anthony Pardal Campaign Manager - Jeremy Ring for Florida CFO | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer PO Box 670311 Coral Springs FL 33067 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =. .

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: fw: Do you stand with me and the First Lady?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
The First Lady emailed you. |
---
| | | | | | |
Friend,

My better half, Melania, recently asked you to sign your Presidential Pledge of Support.

She decided she could no longer stand on the sidelines.

Now the First Lady and I hope you will show the media and every single one of our opponents that you stand with us too.

**[Will you stand with the First Lady and sign your Presidential Pledge of Support?](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2f8254e835a129cda98915b0608de06f76bec4bac7d4d2f077b07d7cab4df9c82fb1eb61ae0e8db861123c5d5abc0f9866e1f7f9defabb35) **

Donald J. Trump
President of the United States

From:** Melania Trump
**Subject:** I never envisioned
**To:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2f8254e835a129cdd6c425be4e5743416f5f375dcc8b4792d9707774f28112fc865486d6434651cba97ff0983f7e0b48d405a1d3db71816b)**

Friend,

>From the moment my husband, Donald, placed his hand on the bible and took the oath of office to serve as America's President, he has worked nonstop to deliver on his promises.

Democrats and the opposition media are doing everything they possibly can to discredit Donald with false accusations by spreading their fake news and making it appear that he does not have the support of America's voters.

**[That is why I am asking that you join my husband as he fights for our nation by signing your Presidential Pledge of Support.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2f8254e835a129cda98915b0608de06f76bec4bac7d4d2f077b07d7cab4df9c82fb1eb61ae0e8db861123c5d5abc0f9866e1f7f9defabb35)**

Up until a few years ago, I never envisioned that I would one day serve our nation as First Lady.

Everything you and I believe in regarding the future of America is on the line in the coming months. _This is a battle we must win together._

I'm asking you and other Americans across the country to personally register your support and help prove that the Democrats and media are wrong.

**[Please sign your Presidential Pledge of Support. I look forward to telling Donald that you are standing with him.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2f8254e835a129cd1572bc34d38893d1fbaeeeeaa044ab76758fd68a79ee25cbac3e18c53f87579119ffc14a5bb2ca739c66407f16303dc1)**

Melania Trump

name: Ben Mitchell
subject: Hoosiers Must Choose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
[](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jjuhyull-kujulhlke-y/)
---
| | Peter, **Elections are about choices.** But this election is not simply a choice between two candidates of differing political parties. It’s not even about two opposing political philosophies. **This election is a choice between the DC Swamp and We The People. Between Radical Liberalism and Hoosier Conservatism.** Between Obstructionism in the Washington Swamp and Proven Success in Indiana. Frankly, Tuesday’s election is a choice between Prosperity and Partisanship. Hoosiers must choose, but, for those of us who envision a brighter future for America and a thriving Indiana, the choice is clear.
# **Hoosiers must choose, but, for those of us who envision a brighter future for America and a thriving Indiana, the choice is clear.**
If you believe that our families deserve better than the DC radicals who have fought tooth and nail to keep Washington gridlocked with extremism, corruption, and inefficiency, then I’m asking you to join me in choosing Mike Braun for Senate on Tuesday. **Let’s set the right example for our children and lead the fight for real results in Washington.** **Let’s elect Mike Braun on Tuesday.** Ben Mitchell
Campaign Manager

name: Zack Malitz, betofortexas.com
subject: The good news, our plan and the challenge
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Wanted to
send you a quick note this morning before the team and I head out to talk
to more voters.

Here’s the good news: Texans broke early voting records last week, largely
because Beto’s invited hundreds of thousands of new voters to join our
movement and vote for his positive vision. And a brand-new poll that
dropped yesterday shows Beto and Cruz are tied, 49% - 49%.

Here’s our plan: With just two days to go, we’re going to make sure each
of Beto’s supporters VOTE. We’re going to knock on one million doors
before the polls close on Election Day, and we need to keep Beto’s
positive ads up on airwaves across Texas.

Here’s the challenge: We need to be absolutely sure we’re able to reach as
many voters as we can before the polls close on Election Day -- and that’s
going to take significant resources.

So I’m asking -- again. We can’t fall short. We can’t let Beto down. Not
now -- not after all the work we’ve put in to get him elected.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181104&t=1019&akid=24028%2E444211%2EevvAFc ]We need to hit our FINAL fundraising goal to help our organizers stay
out in the field, talking to voters -- and to keep Beto’s positive ads up
on airwaves across the state. If you can afford to, click here to pitch in
if you can. We’ll put every single
penny to good use.

Zack Malitz

But we’re not done yet, so I have to ask -- can you chip in $10 or more right now to help us hit our final fundraising goal of this campaign by tomorrow night? Your donations right now are going directly to turning out voters and making our closing argument to Tennesseans. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** Thanks for being on our team, Laura Zapata Communications Director Bredesen for Senate Paid for by Bredesen Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Bredesen for Senate and the Tennessee Democratic Party Bredesen Victory Fund P.O. Friend,

We are ONLY TWO DAYS OUT from the election that could put our Presidency in grave danger.

_Do you know where your polling place is?_ [FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bb1480d628a7851eaf2aded073713f92f27289d6dfd1929d531dafad2f5542de32e527fdc7116d92a9c5a26c6dbb39394613df77a4fb4388)

They know how important our Democratic Senate seat is in the fight for Senate control. NBC even reports that the GOP sees this seat as its TOP takeover opportunity. So, for the next few days, we must do everything we can to prove them wrong and pull out a win here in North Dakota.

name: Dana Bye
subject: The New York Times is polling our race right now, and it's a dead heat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
The New York Times is currently polling our race in VA-7. They are publishing the results on their website live, as interviews roll in, and this poll again shows that Abigail is locked in a dead heat -- a statistical tie! -- with Rep. Dave Brat.
| | Peter, _The New York Times_ is currently polling our race in VA-7. _They are publishing the results on their website live, as interviews roll in,_ **and this poll again shows that Abigail is locked in a dead heat --_a statistical tie!_ \-- with Rep. Dave Brat.** **[Can you make a donation to support our critical get-out-the-vote efforts, so we can defeat Rep. Brat and send Abigail to Congress?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Iq-mHa8Ewjny9QSX48QXQ9Zr_6Luw2I2zIb_5UmuCFw=/1Xp3IaGzEjjfHvaTvCU2qwyYOfsEd_7paUKusTMsLKU=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.04_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) **This race is very tight, Peter, and we need your help right now to surge to a lead. Now, you might be wondering -- will your support really make a difference this late? But I promise you, _it matters now more than ever._ When a race is this close, the campaign that gets more of their supporters to the polls to vote wins -- it's that simple. And we are counting on this grassroots team's support to pay for our ambitious get-out-vote program. We need to keep printing walk packets for volunteers and buy gas so we can drive voters to the polls. This is it, Peter. We have two days to deliver a win. [**Please chip in whatever you can -- whether that 's $5 or $50 -- so we can finish strong.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Iq-mHa8Ewjny9QSX48QXQ9Zr_6Luw2I2zIb_5UmuCFw=/1Xp3IaGzEjjfHvaTvCU2qwyYOfsEd_7paUKusTMsLKU=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.04_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Iq-mHa8Ewjny9QSX48QXQ9Zr_6Luw2I2zIb_5UmuCFw=/1Xp3IaGzEjjfHvaTvCU2qwyYOfsEd_7paUKusTMsLKU=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.04_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Iq-mHa8Ewjny9QSX48QXQ9Zr_6Luw2I2zIb_5UmuCFw=/1Xp3IaGzEjjfHvaTvCU2qwyYOfsEd_7paUKusTMsLKU=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/Iq-mHa8Ewjny9QSX48QXQ9Zr_6Luw2I2zIb_5UmuCFw=/p67mGqI8tQE8mbEyCClmiEAvf5XwRVrOaAJmsaac_S8=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/Iq-mHa8Ewjny9QSX48QXQ9Zr_6Luw2I2zIb_5UmuCFw=/IExGYuPPsqQZhLTdfDDQOHSFcCdzhmjpbywQaSRvnC0=).

subject: With 48 hours to go, we're a bit short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:

Peter, we're almost there. With 48 hours to go, we have canvassers all over our district, and ads all over the airwaves. We are fighting our hearts out to win every vote for Jessica before polls close Tuesday night.
**But the finance team is telling me we 're just a bit short of what we need to close this race out strong. **
**Thanks to you, we have just a four-point gap to close. You 've brought us this far--now, chip in to help us foot the bill for the final voter outreach to win this election:**

This team has moved mountains to make this race competitive, and I can't express how grateful I am. It's been an honor to work on this campaign to elect Jessica and alongside you.

clean_body: Peter, we're almost there. With 48 hours to go, we have canvassers all over our district, and ads all over the airwaves. We are fighting our hearts out to win every vote for Jessica before polls close Tuesday night. But the finance team is telling me we 're just a bit short of what we need to close this race out strong. Thanks to you, we have just a four-point gap to close. You 've brought us this far--now, chip in to help us foot the bill for the final voter outreach to win this election: | ---|--- | | This team has moved mountains to make this race competitive, and I can't express how grateful I am. It's been an honor to work on this campaign to elect Jessica and alongside you. You've drawn national attention to this race with your donations, your volunteer hours, and your tireless grassroots energy. Thanks to you, Jessica has mounted the strongest challenge this district has seen in a decade. Thank you, Kim Kim Howard Campaign Manager Morse for Congress P.S. = Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign. name: Mandi Karp, Steve Sisolak for Governor
subject: New plan- please read:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
Our department heads have been meeting this morning and I have some exciting news.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/A8wHC6uhz4wSZs1I8Quj1JfgIuHPqyT0We3aRfZ0yJw=/aL0uM13zBPYspzb_ghouM_yh93PEziCHZs0d5mMnN58=?gpsid=37_57_4998&refcode=em18_181104_newpln_LG_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181104_newpln_LG_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
---
Dear friend,

We were in a whole mess of trouble on Friday, but after supporters like you stepped up big time to keep this campaign running, I'm reaching out with some exciting news.

Our department heads have been meeting this morning and, given the incredible volunteer turnout we've seen over the last few days, **we 've come up with an expanded get-out-the-vote plan.** But now everyone is looking at me to make sure we can pay for it.

That's where you come in friend.

**[We need another $7,500 to fund this expanded GOTV plan. Can you chip in before this evening so I can give everyone the green light?](https://act.myngp.com/el/A8wHC6uhz4wSZs1I8Quj1JfgIuHPqyT0We3aRfZ0yJw=/aL0uM13zBPYspzb_ghouM_yh93PEziCHZs0d5mMnN58=?gpsid=37_57_4998&refcode=em18_181104_newpln_L1_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181104_newpln_L1_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

This race is a dead heat, with both candidates neck and neck in their share of decided voters. But there are plenty of voters who aren't as plugged into the news who are still undecided.

That's why we huddled today to create this new GOTV plan to reach even more voters. We can't leave anything to chance.

**[Will you help us reach out to even more voters? We can do it if everyone chips in $3 or more right now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/A8wHC6uhz4wSZs1I8Quj1JfgIuHPqyT0We3aRfZ0yJw=/aL0uM13zBPYspzb_ghouM_yh93PEziCHZs0d5mMnN58=?gpsid=37_57_4998&refcode=em18_181104_newpln_L2_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181104_newpln_L2_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**
[HELP STEVE CONNECT WITH UNDECIDED VOTERS](https://act.myngp.com/el/A8wHC6uhz4wSZs1I8Quj1JfgIuHPqyT0We3aRfZ0yJw=/aL0uM13zBPYspzb_ghouM_yh93PEziCHZs0d5mMnN58=?gpsid=37_57_4998&refcode=em18_181104_newpln_B1_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181104_newpln_B1_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

The team is so excited about this opportunity. They have the plan in place. It's my job as the finance director to raise the funds, so I hope you'll help out. I don't want to let Steve down.

Thanks,

Mandi Karp
Finance Director
Steve Sisolak for Governor

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/A8wHC6uhz4wSZs1I8Quj1JfgIuHPqyT0We3aRfZ0yJw=/aL0uM13zBPYspzb_ghouM_yh93PEziCHZs0d5mMnN58=?gpsid=37_57_4998&refcode=em18_181104_newpln_B2_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181104_newpln_B2_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

name: Mark Warner
subject: re: Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, I'm writing you with just 48 hours before Virginians head to the polls.

We have scale-tipping, game-changing races this year and in two days, we'll know how the final votes fall. **I 'm going to ask you to dig deep and chip in one more time to make sure they fall in our favor, but first I'm going to tell you why:**
* 1\. We have critical elections every single year in Virginia -- the voters we can turn out in these final days create the foundation for long-term victories.

* 2\. Tim's ad and persuasion program was recently acknowledged by The Washington Post for its "scale and the sophisticated design." Simply put, it could change the blueprint of how we reach voters in future elections.

* 3\. To continue running this program, to flip the House, and to set us up for victory in Virginia in 2019, 2020, and beyond, Tim's campaign needs to hit their final fundraising goal by Election Night, no exceptions.

**Derek, they have $27,600 to go in order to keep this program running with no shortcuts and have the resources to handle whatever last minute attacks or post-election recounts come up. With just 48 hours to spare, will you donate to Tim Kaine and help Virginia Democrats win?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10ac/3e0906/756a551c/3e377f27/1375081166/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181104_1_FR_MRW_Warner-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20181104_1_FR_MRW_Warner-LDND&source=20181104_1_FR_MRW_Warner-LDND")

---
| [**DONATE $100**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10ac/3e0906/756a551c/3e377f39/1375081166/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20181104_1_FR_MRW_Warner-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=20181104_1_FR_MRW_Warner-LDND&source=20181104_1_FR_MRW_Warner-LDND")
---
| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10ac/3e0906/756a551c/3e377f38/1375081166/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181104_1_FR_MRW_Warner-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20181104_1_FR_MRW_Warner-LDND&source=20181104_1_FR_MRW_Warner-LDND")
---
The truth is, this is an investment in our future.

It's an investment in the outcomes two days from now, but also every year after as we aim to elect the right people to do the right jobs and represent our values.

**Can you help, Derek? If we do this right, it 's going to be big deal.**

[https://secure.timkaine.com/November](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10ac/3e0906/756a551c/3e377f3f/1375081166/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181104_1_FR_MRW_Warner-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+httpssecuretimkainecomNovember&utm_campaign=20181104_1_FR_MRW_Warner-LDND&source=20181104_1_FR_MRW_Warner-LDND")

Thank you for reading, take care -- we have a long but important two days ahead.

_Mark Warner_

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Remember Pam?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
I met Pam last year during a trip to Macon, Georgia. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa795/34a064cc/34fdbe0/70ce87a/3335990847/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Brothers and sisters, I met Pam last year during one of many trips to Macon, Georgia. When I met her, Pam had two daughters on their way to college - one of whom was expecting, due to give birth shortly before leaving for school. Like many family members across Georgia, Pam planned to raise her grandchild while her daughter got her education. Pam told me all about what she wanted for her daughters, about their aspirations and goals: One, to become an educator; the other, to work in law enforcement. I couldn't help but wonder - and I finally had a moment to ask - what Pam wanted for her own life. She looked at me like I was crazy. "I just told you everything that I want." I clarified, "But Pam, what do you want for yourself?" Pam paused. After a few seconds, she replied, "I don't know. No one has ever asked me that question before." You see, Pam had been a cashier at the local Piggly Wiggly for twenty years, and she assumed that's what she'd be doing for the rest of her life. I pushed her a little harder. "I'm asking." After a moment, Pam finally told me, "I'd love to turn that building down the road into a daycare facility. To help women just like my daughter. And to help other children get a head start." I'm running for governor because I believe it's time for Georgians like Pam to get their chance. I believe every Georgian, no matter where they live or how much money they make, should both know what their goals are and have the freedom and opportunity to pursue them. Because all too often, our circumstances fence us in. We allow the reality of what _is_ to dictate what _could be_. I want to imagine more for Georgia. Yes, it is important to invest in bringing big business into our state, but it is also critical to invest in Pam, Inc. _Because this, right now, is Pam 's time. This is all of our time._ And when we stand united - knocking on doors, chipping in when we can, reaching out to our friends and neighbors - we win. So please: **[Help write the next chapter of Georgia's future by making a $3 donation to my campaign for Governor. We've got two days left to win this election for Pam and for millions of other Georgians who deserve the freedom and opportunity to pursue their dreams.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa795/34a064cc/34fdbe0/70ce87b/3335990847/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTA0MjAxOC1iIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-november?refcode=IE11042018-b")** I see the promise and potential of Georgia in people like Pam - a potential waiting to be unlocked. All we have to do is ask. I will keep asking, and keep treating _all_ Georgians like we are worth the investment. Because I know that we are. All my best, Stacey Abrams
---

**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa795/34a064cc/34fdbe0/70ce87b/3335990847/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTA0MjAxOC1iIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-november?refcode=IE11042018-b")**

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: As President Trump makes his way to Tennessee
body:
| Peter -- As President Trump makes his way to Tennessee, I wanted to share this message with you, because I believe Tennesseans deserve a different approach than the than the politics coming out of Washington. Voters in Tennessee are going to have a real choice in a couple of days. For those who are pleased with what our government is becoming, who believe in hard-edged partisanship, that people with different views from their own are the enemy, no compromise, I’m not their guy. They have another choice, someone who has helped build that world for the past 16 years, is steeped in it, and is good at it. I want something different. I believe leadership is working to find common ground, not to divide. In independence of thought. In deliberation and compromise and getting things done. And yes, I believe in American exceptionalism. We shouldn’t put up with intrigue and corruption and intolerance. Our forebears came here to escape all that; leave it behind. The belief that America is exceptional, that we’ve been given the opportunity and the charge to be the standard of civility, the model of enlightened self-government, is not partisan. Leaders as diverse as Thomas Jefferson and Abraham Lincoln, as John Kennedy and Ronald Reagan have embraced it. Today, I challenge you and I challenge myself to devote ourselves to restoring the faith that has sustained America—that it’s our destiny to occupy an exceptional place in the world. And I’m glad I can count on your support. Thanks for all your help, Phil Bredesen | | ******[Donate Today »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3017769/19825332/-1207524935?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTlmMzIyNy03YWUwLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lJqLqX-fxKbjF6KYDZSTWYT9734QlIu8Kl-ymC6cuaY=&refcode=em181104-phil&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)******

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Those in power will do anything to keep that power
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE
body:
There is nothing they won't do to hold onto power because THEY SEE THAT WE ARE WINNING. Peter, I haven't been in politics very long, but I always knew that there are people who will do anything to hold onto that power. We have seen it with Chuck Schumer in Washington, and we are seeing it with Senator McCaskill right here in Missouri. Sadly, the media seems to be in on the plan with Schumer and Senator McCaskill. _Some of you_ are going to read false stories about me in the newspapers. _Some of you_ are going to receive illegal and misleading mailers about me in your mailbox. _Some of you_ will receive deceptive emails and text messages. There is nothing they won't do to hold onto power because THEY SEE THAT WE ARE WINNING. I see fantastic momentum on the ground as I travel throughout the state. **I see it, and I know Senator McCaskill sees it too._She knows we are winning, and it terrifies her._** We cannot allow these attacks to go unanswered. [Will you rush a last-minute donation to our campaign to help us fight back and win this election?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=aee5dd4a4f12414dbfc474a69b384bec&_e=fbSskt3W5v0o5QV4kFK4r0kCL_KFLV3KNiVMdrGpAJJquB9O10xXPSsjVRNEsxD94UigHOksMZLN24dDa-mUW3bMz7vZ1hK-G9SjH7PMQK5l4XgJbd5VkTz_tO6SvnrlZZpnmWO-DKm6B-HHbv3WVloDwdWm2rJzb2kwxEHx3encykz9gRtQ1uYE1FHCjmi7i0EDzNl-bsUjD0QVj1XvkPP7e4YNJV_Sizegc4wVN2QEzt_WykzBzuFlwN88Q_pPfEtdjnLDPriXuUlyOnFkmt_6_e3rE9fwAeacBeCV5DmHe0Q34RoU33bZg0InzFiUOKTtkIo7eDHKQ5OXfzirtFRAAGQktFDYz3MkilOPhQui7wXxUF1VpCEFkj_sEbiZU7C4qa9m2HExnWuPp6Xs7w%3D%3D) clean_body: There is nothing they won't do to hold onto power because THEY SEE THAT WE ARE WINNING. Peter, I haven't been in politics very long, but I always knew that there are people who will do anything to hold onto that power. We have seen it with Chuck Schumer in Washington, and we are seeing it with Senator McCaskill right here in Missouri. Sadly, the media seems to be in on the plan with Schumer and Senator McCaskill. Some of you are going to read false stories about me in the newspapers. Some of you are going to receive illegal and misleading mailers about me in your mailbox. Some of you will receive deceptive emails and text messages. There is nothing they won't do to hold onto power because THEY SEE THAT WE ARE WINNING. I see fantastic momentum on the ground as I travel throughout the state. I see it, and I know Senator McCaskill sees it too.She knows we are winning, and it terrifies her. We cannot allow these attacks to go unanswered. We need to send Senator McCaskill home (on her plane) and get to work in Washington, DC. Josh Hawley | "Facebook" "Twitter" "Google+" PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE

name: Heidi Heitkamp
subject: things aren't looking good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friends, I need your immediate help. Voters have already begun casting their ballots by mail in North Dakota. And everyone from The Washington Post to Roll Call continues to _ increase my likelihood of losing_. Things aren't looking good.
It gets even worse: Twenty-three right-wing groups, including a Mitch McConnell-linked super PAC, are spending more than $10 million to buy our Senate seat - and trust me, that kind of money goes a long way in North Dakota.

**That's why we're going to need to hit every single fundraising goal between now and Election Day. With just hours until midnight, we still need to raise about $11,000 if we want to take back the Senate for Democrats. But right now, we're falling short and time is running out.**
**I wouldn't ask if it weren't important: [Please, can you give $5 or more right now - whatever you can spare - to win in North Dakota so we can take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk919-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
NBC News, Roll Call and POLITICO all say I'm the most vulnerable Democratic senator in the entire country. That's why CNN downgraded our race from "Toss-up" to "Lean Republican." Quite literally, whether we hit this goal could mean the difference between winning and losing.
That's why I'm counting on your immediate contribution, Friends: **Will you donate right now to help us reach our critical goal, win in North Dakota and protect every Democratic Senate seat?**
**[Give every dollar you can right now- before our midnight deadline - to defend North Dakota's Democratic Senate seat and take back the Senate for Democrats!](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk919-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
So much is at stake, and I'm so grateful to have you on my team. Thank you.

Heidi
| | [Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk919-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
---

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: FWD: counting on you, everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there, wanted to check in. Campaign experts say that losing in North Dakota could eliminate our best chance to take back a Democratic Senate, so we have to ask:
With just two days until Election Day, are you doing everything you can to stand with Senator Heidi Heitkamp? Here's the link to give: [**https://hassan.bsd.net/Protect-Heidi-Heitkamp**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc121/2a380d31/371e1c46/f17c5e/126479073/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoNGhlaWRpIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODExMDRfTVdINEhILUhIMS1raWNrXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh4heidi?refcode=e20181104_MWH4HH-HH1-kick_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thanks so much -- your help in these last few days could be the thing that wins or loses this critical race.
-- Team Maggie
_\--------------------Original Message from Heidi Heitkamp--------------------_
**Team --** **POLITICO says losing in North Dakota would virtually throw away our only chance to take back the Senate for Democrats. That's why 23 right-wing groups are spending $10.5 million to defeat me.**
They know how important our Democratic Senate seat is in the fight for Senate control. NBC even reports that the GOP sees this seat as its TOP takeover opportunity. So, for the next few days, we must do everything we can to prove them wrong and pull out a win here in North Dakota.
**What we do between now and the election will make a huge impact. Time is running out, and I'm counting on you, everyone:[Please, will you rush $3 or more right now - whatever you can spare - to win in North Dakota so we can take back the Senate for Democrats?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc121/2a380d31/371e1c46/f17c5e/126479073/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoNGhlaWRpIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODExMDRfTVdINEhILUhIMS1raWNrXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh4heidi?refcode=e20181104_MWH4HH-HH1-kick_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")**

name: Kathy Manning
subject: It's up to us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Everyone keeps calling this a "toss-up" race. But remember -- a "toss-up" isn't the same as a coin toss. The outcome isn't up to luck or fate. It's up to us, right now. Close campaigns
|
---

| | Everyone keeps calling this a "toss-up" race. But remember -- a "toss-up" isn't the same as a coin toss. The outcome isn't up to luck or fate. It's up to us, right now. Close campaigns are won and lost with GOTV. [_**We're about $4,475 away from hitting our $15,000 goal and matching our field team door-for-dollar.**_](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427ad0/e3b7d3/5e028fbc/25556979/4230173608/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181104am?refcode=kme181104am_m") [**_Can you pitch in?_**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427ad0/e3b7d3/5e028fbc/25556979/4230173608/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181104am?refcode=kme181104am_m") This race is close. Closer than close. It's the "textbook definition" of close. Ted Budd's team is out there, working hard. His special interest allies are spending thousands of dollars a day, airing attacks so false several have been pulled from the air. That's how they plan to win. We're different. We're going to win the same way we turned this into a toss-up race -- with grassroots power on the ground and online. _**[Be one of the donors we need to give in the next few hours.](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427ad0/e3b7d3/5e028fbc/25556979/4230173608/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181104am?refcode=kme181104am_m")**_ | | | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427ad0/e3b7d3/5e028fbc/25556979/4230173608/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181104am?refcode=kme181104am_m")
---
Thanks!
Kathy

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

name: Tina Smith
subject: One final one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Leave no doubt.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-november?refcode=rtw_20181104-1_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, in a minute I'm going to ask you to make one final contribution to this campaign, but first I want to explain why it is so important. When we started this campaign, I said I wanted it to be people-powered and grassroots driven. And we've done that, powered by over 60,000 contributors giving over 100,000 contributions we've shown everyone watching this is a campaign not for the special interests but by and for the people. And this truly is the most consequential election of our lifetimes. There is so much on the line -- health care, the future of the Senate, and the fate of Trump's agenda in Washington -- we have to give it everything we have. I will be honest with you, polls show this race is going to very close and I'm worried that if we don't talk to every voter we can this could tip the other way. So I'm asking you, team, to dig as deep as you can one more time. Between now and Monday at midnight we have one final fundraising goal we need to hit -- $40,000 to fully fund every part of our get out the vote campaign. This is it. If we hit this goal, we will have run a campaign we can all be proud of and done it relying on small grassroots donors like you. **[Will you step up and make a contribution so we can hit this goal and ensure we don't fall short with just hours left until the polls open? Rush a contribution here. ](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-november?refcode=rtw_20181104-1_em-full&amount=10&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** [Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-november?refcode=rtw_20181104-1_em-full&amount=10&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") We have worked so hard over this past year, knocking doors, traveling the state, talking to every voter we can -- and now it all comes down to what happens on Tuesday. Let's not leave anything to doubt. Thank you for everything you are doing, Tina Smith | **Tina Smith is a fierce progressive running for U.S. Senate in a special election in Minnesota. That 's why Senate Republicans and Donald Trump have made her one of their top targets. She needs your help if she is going to win this tough race. ** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-november?refcode=rtw_20181104-1_em-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
---

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I need you to give $26 before Trump comes tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Trump wants me to lose my job. He keeps coming back to Ohio because he thinks he can rally enough support for my opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci, to make that happen. That's why he'll be in town again tomorrow in hopes of closing the deal. But you know what matters more than Trump's shockingly-frequent visits? **Your support.** We've built one of the strongest grassroots networks in the country -- not with huge checks from outside groups, [**but one $26 average online contribution at a time.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd34/4462dc26/76364d20/201f1ee1/691395824/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTA0YW0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181104am?refcode=sbe181104am_m_other&refcode2=3268183") [**Today, with just 48 hours before Election Day, I'm asking you to give again -- and if you can, match our $26 average online contribution.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd34/4462dc26/76364d20/201f1ee1/691395824/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTA0YW0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181104am?refcode=sbe181104am_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd34/4462dc26/76364d20/201f1ee0/691395824/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTA0YW0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181104am?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe181104am_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd34/4462dc26/76364d20/201f1ee0/691395824/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTA0YW0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181104am?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe181104am_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd34/4462dc26/76364d20/201f1ee0/691395824/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTA0YW0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181104am?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe181104am_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd34/4462dc26/76364d20/201f1ee1/691395824/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTA0YW0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181104am?refcode=sbe181104am_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** Peter, I know it's Sunday. I'm sure you have better things to do than read another message from me, asking you to give money. But this truly is crunch time. Personal, nasty attacks against me are everywhere. **New polling confirms we're losing ground.** And as I mentioned, President Trump will be in the Buckeye state tomorrow. **If we don't fight back, we could lose.** Renacci and Trump could spend the foreseeable future pushing an agenda that strips Americans of their healthcare, takes away protections for workers, ends Medicare and Social Security as we know them, and who knows what else. This race isn't a sure thing. Until the final precinct closes and the final ballot is counted, we must keep working. [**So if you can, match our $26 average online contribution before Trump takes the stage tomorrow.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd34/4462dc26/76364d20/201f1ee1/691395824/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTA0YW0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181104am?refcode=sbe181104am_m_other&refcode2=3268183") With immense gratitude, Sherrod _P.S.: I know $26 might be a lot to ask. But even if you can give is $5 or even $3,[**please give today.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd34/4462dc26/76364d20/201f1ee1/691395824/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTA0YW0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181104am?refcode=sbe181104am_m_other&refcode2=3268183")_

clean_body: | | | Trump wants me to lose my job. He keeps coming back to Ohio because he thinks he can rally enough support for my opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci, to make that happen. That's why he'll be in town again tomorrow in hopes of closing the deal. But you know what matters more than Trump's shockingly-frequent visits? Your support. We've built one of the strongest grassroots networks in the country -- not with huge checks from outside groups, "" "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Peter, I know it's Sunday. I'm sure you have better things to do than read another message from me, asking you to give money. But this truly is crunch time. Personal, nasty attacks against me are everywhere. New polling confirms we're losing ground. And as I mentioned, President Trump will be in the Buckeye state tomorrow. If we don't fight back, we could lose. Renacci and Trump could spend the foreseeable future pushing an agenda that strips Americans of their healthcare, takes away protections for workers, ends Medicare and Social Security as we know them, and who knows what else. This race isn't a sure thing. Until the final precinct closes and the final ballot is counted, we must keep working. "" With immense gratitude, Sherrod P.S.: I know $26 might be a lot to ask. But even if you can give is $5 or even $3, "" | "" "" | | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: FW: The New York Times is polling our race right now, and it's a dead heat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
The latest poll of our race confirms what all the polls have said: This campaign has gained tremendous strength, but I am locked in a dead heat with Rep. Dave Brat with only two days left to go.
| | Peter, I hope you saw the news about the latest poll of our race. Because it confirms what all the polls have said: This campaign has gained tremendous strength, but **I am locked in a dead heat with Rep. Dave Brat with only two days left to go.** We can win this race on Tuesday, but I am counting on your support to do so, so my team can keep our get-out-the-vote program going strong until the polls close. [**Can you make a donation right now to help me deliver a win for Virginia families?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/lPrumX2vC4xAkxO9OQKbQfVU8EwGFEcc-Eo7DUJKYyY=/aAOlHh29MaQz9hQ4Y-WsOkVB3BZ-_664PTMMTBqR0f0=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.04_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Your support has been critical to pushing this historically Republican district to a tie, Peter, and I want to thank you for staying with us. [**Please consider chipping in again, because victory is in sight.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/lPrumX2vC4xAkxO9OQKbQfVU8EwGFEcc-Eo7DUJKYyY=/aAOlHh29MaQz9hQ4Y-WsOkVB3BZ-_664PTMMTBqR0f0=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.04_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) You are making a difference. Thanks, \- Abigail \-----forwarded message----- From: Dana Bye Sent: Sun, Nov 4, 1:22 PM Subject: The New York Times is polling our race right now Friends, _The New York Times_ is currently polling our race in VA-7. _They are publishing the results on their website live, as interviews roll in,_ **and this poll again shows that Abigail is locked in a dead heat --_a statistical tie!_ \-- with Rep. Dave Brat.** **[Can you make a donation to support our critical get-out-the-vote efforts, so we can defeat Rep. Brat and send Abigail to Congress?](https://act.myngp.com/el/lPrumX2vC4xAkxO9OQKbQfVU8EwGFEcc-Eo7DUJKYyY=/aAOlHh29MaQz9hQ4Y-WsOkVB3BZ-_664PTMMTBqR0f0=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.04_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) **This race is very tight, friends, and we need your help right now to surge to a lead. Now, you might be wondering -- will your support really make a difference this late? But I promise you, _it matters now more than ever._ When a race is this close, the campaign that gets more of their supporters to the polls to vote wins -- it's that simple. And we are counting on this grassroots team's support to pay for our ambitious get-out-vote program. We need to keep printing walk packets for volunteers and buy gas so we can drive voters to the polls. This is it, friends. We have two days to deliver a win. [**Please chip in whatever you can -- whether that 's $5 or $50 -- so we can finish strong.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/lPrumX2vC4xAkxO9OQKbQfVU8EwGFEcc-Eo7DUJKYyY=/aAOlHh29MaQz9hQ4Y-WsOkVB3BZ-_664PTMMTBqR0f0=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.04_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/lPrumX2vC4xAkxO9OQKbQfVU8EwGFEcc-Eo7DUJKYyY=/aAOlHh29MaQz9hQ4Y-WsOkVB3BZ-_664PTMMTBqR0f0=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.04_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/lPrumX2vC4xAkxO9OQKbQfVU8EwGFEcc-Eo7DUJKYyY=/aAOlHh29MaQz9hQ4Y-WsOkVB3BZ-_664PTMMTBqR0f0=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/lPrumX2vC4xAkxO9OQKbQfVU8EwGFEcc-Eo7DUJKYyY=/_MnqxTfa9ZmfOOBgkjaN-stq8hf4pKBNgOcVc7h4s9w=)_

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Our democracy is on the ballot. Vote.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
body:
Already voted? Please forward this to your friends
__ [**Do not sit this one out, there is too much at stake!**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de918e3/70cdc2ba/4655afc4/3907107/4100744788/VEsH/ "https://iwillvote.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Do+not+sit+this+one+out+there+is+too+muc&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_FR_WL_181104_1_1&source=CVH_EM_FR_WL_181104_1_1")

Friend,

There are just 2 days left until Election Day. All year long, we've talked about how this is the most important midterm election of our lifetimes. But none of the work we've done up to this point matters unless we have strong voter turnout. For all Marylanders, I hope you will join me in voting for the fantastic Democrats we have running statewide--Ben Cardin, Ben Jealous, Susie Turnbull, Brian Frosh, and Peter Franchot. In order to check Donald Trump, we also need to elect all our Democratic congressional candidates: Jesse Colvin, Dutch Ruppersberger, John Sarbanes, Anthony Brown, Steny Hoyer, David Trone, Elijah Cummings, and Jamie Raskin.

Please also get out to vote for all our Democratic candidates for state and local offices. We need to send a strong, united, message: we are one country, and we will not be divided by Trump's poison.

[**You can find your polling place here: IWillVote.com.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de918e3/70cdc2ba/4655afc4/3907104/4100744788/VEsE/ "https://iwillvote.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+You+can+find+your+polling+place+here+IWi&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_FR_WL_181104_1_1&source=CVH_EM_FR_WL_181104_1_1") And if you've already voted, could you please forward this to a friend? Every single vote counts. In the words of my dear friend, John Lewis, "The vote is precious. It is almost sacred. It's the most powerful nonviolent tool we have in a democratic society, and we've got to use it."

Chris

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
---
Van Hollen for Senate
10605 Concord Street, Suite 202
Kensington, MD 20895

Thank you for standing with Chris!

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de918e3/70cdc2ba/4655afc4/3907105/4100744788/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_FR_WL_181104_1_1&source=CVH_EM_FR_WL_181104_1_1") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. subject: The most important things you can the before the election.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY IAN TODD FOR CONGRESS
body:
** The election is this Tuesday!
------------------------------------------------------------
Time has gone by very quickly this past year, and we are soon going to see the results of our hard work, but there are still a few very important things you can do to help election day be the day we want it to be. The first is to talk to your neighbors, let them know why voting is important to you and what you hope the future will bring.

The second is to volunteer however you can to help get people out to the polls, below is a link where you can download an app that is helping our team reach people across the district.

Get OutVote (https://campaigns.outvote.io/ian-todd?utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=d50846a689-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_11_04_06_56&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-d50846a689-9291445)

Lastly, you can always contribute to our campaign. The last few dollars help us keep our ads alive and ensure that we have solid ground to stand on the next two days.

Thank you so much for doing your part and being part of our DFL family this year! This campaign has been a life-changing experience and I am so proud to have shared it with all of you.

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Senator Bernie Sanders and I have an important message for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Are you seeing what I'm seeing?
#
Friends,
Are you seeing what I'm seeing?
I spent the past two weeks touring the country with Senator Bernie Sanders. We traveled thousands of miles to speak with thousands of college students, parents, and working families about all we have to lose - and gain - this election.
**I have a favor to ask. Will you take one minute out of your weekend to listen to Bernie and I explain why this moment right now is so important?**
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a762/bed43eb/8dae24fd/75fc4cfb/291477608/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-votes?refcode=em181104-full&noskip=true")
I've had a long career in politics and progressive activism and I have to say that I have _never_ seen a group of people so motivated to bring about a political revolution. We have the people, we have the tools and - right now - we have momentum on our side.
Can you help make sure we finish strong on Tuesday night?
**[Watch Senator Sanders and I explain what's at stake this election and then chip in $5- or whatever amount you can afford right now. We will put your contribution directly toward our goal of texting more than 4 MILLION supporters in key progressive districts ahead of Tuesday's election.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a762/bed43eb/8dae24fd/75fc4cfb/291477608/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-votes?refcode=em181104-full&noskip=true")**
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution

subject: TIED.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

A brand-new poll from Change Research shows that Beto and Ted Cruz are
TIED, 49% - 49%. There’s no room to slip up or slow down: we only have two
days to push Beto over the top and win.

Now, every single grassroots
donation means that much more. We need to push harder than ever to reach
our FINAL fundraising goal before the polls close on Tuesday.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181104&t=1019&akid=24227%2E444211%2EC8fetF ]This election is so close, it could come down to a
handful of votes. Don’t wake up on November 7 wishing you’d done more to
elect Beto. Can you dig deep and give your first contribution -- even $3
-- to help unseat Ted Cruz?

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181104&t=1021&akid=24227%2E444211%2EC8fetF ]Contribute
$3
»

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181104&t=1022&akid=24227%2E444211%2EC8fetF ]Beto for Texas

When Beto kicked off his campaign for Senate more than 20 months ago,
pundits on both sides of the aisle said he didn’t stand a chance against
Ted Cruz -- especially if Beto refused to take contributions from PACs and
special interest groups.

But Beto decided to run this campaign the RIGHT way, putting his trust
fully in the hands of the people of Texas.

Now, with just days to go, we’re so close to the finish line -- and Beto
and Cruz are neck-and-neck. So we’re asking:

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181104&t=1023&akid=24227%2E444211%2EC8fetF ]Can you give a contribution of
$3
or more to make sure Beto reaches his FINAL fundraising goal?

We’re so close to making history -- and we couldn’t have gotten this far
without your support. Thank you.

Team Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181104&t=1024&akid=24227%2E444211%2EC8fetF ]Contribute
$3
»

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20181104footer&t=1025&akid=24227%2E444211%2EC8fetF

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=24227%2E444211%2EC8fetF

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Justin Barasky
subject: have you voted yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | There are just two days left until Election Day, Peter. [**It all comes down to this: Sherrod needs all of us to vote. If you haven 't already, please make a plan to do so.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd4b/4462dc26/764b22f5/201f1eaf/2679025141/VEsH/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=OH") It's easy to be frustrated anytime we get a news alert or turn on the TV. **This is our chance to do something about it right here in Ohio -- we can create the type of change we want to see.** Don't sit this election out. [**If you haven 't, _please_ make a plan to get to the polls. If you've already voted, get in touch with five people -- family members, friends, neighbors, anyone you know -- and make sure they've got a plan to vote, too.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd4b/4462dc26/764b22f5/201f1eaf/2679025141/VEsE/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=OH") Let's finish this race strong, Justin

subject: one EXTRA hour
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Daylight Savings Time ended at 2 am this morning you know. You got an extra hour of sleep -- and we get an extra hour of fundraising. Which is great, because for this tight election, we need every hour we can get. [**Debbie told you we need to raise $15,000 for our final-week GOTV efforts, and we're still behind. Will you give $5 or more?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce7/622b7b5b/1dd6ffec/307b62ac/135696256/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181104am?refcode=dwse181104am_m&recurring=true&amount=5") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce7/622b7b5b/1dd6ffec/307b62af/135696256/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMTA0YW0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181104am?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=dwse181104am_m_5&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce7/622b7b5b/1dd6ffec/307b62af/135696256/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMTA0YW0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181104am?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=dwse181104am_m_10&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $25](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce7/622b7b5b/1dd6ffec/307b62af/135696256/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMTA0YW0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181104am?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=dwse181104am_m_25&refcode2=861769")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce7/622b7b5b/1dd6ffec/307b62ae/135696256/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMTA0YW0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181104am?refcode=dwse181104am_m_other&refcode2=861769")** At least one Koch-linked group has attacked Debbie in this election. Her opponents smear her constantly. The GOP would love to see her lose her job in Congress -- she's one of their most outspoken opponents. But this isn't just about Debbie. This election is about something bigger. It's about rejecting Donald Trump and his hate-filled, fear-mongering rhetoric. It's about showing Republicans that we will not stand for their put-the-rich-first, anti-working family agenda. It's about electing Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight for our jobs, our communities, our health care, our environment, and all the rest of our priorities. **Debbie is a part of that fight and so are we.[Help get us to this goal and get in the resources to win big victories on Election Day. Rush in whatever amount makes sense for you >>](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce7/622b7b5b/1dd6ffec/307b62ac/135696256/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181104am?refcode=dwse181104am_m&recurring=true&amount=5")** Thanks! Team DWS

subject: this is my last email
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:

name: John Kerry
subject: can't let Tom down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
I'm writing you again because the situation is critical. It's crunch time and Tom needs your support now more than ever.
I'm writing you again because the situation is critical. It's crunch time and Tom needs your support now more than ever. This could be the most consequential election of our lifetime. I hope I can count on you to do your part to send great leaders like Tom to Congress. **Here 's the link to send an urgent contribution:** **[http://action.tomohalleran.com/help-tom](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.04_b2_jk_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks for stepping up in the final stretch, John Kerry \-----forwarded message----- From: John Kerry Subject: time-sensitive **I 'm personally reaching out with a time-sensitive request:** [**Can I count on you to chip in $25 to Tom 's campaign right this moment?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.04_b2_jk_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I hate to be so blunt, but Democrats need a win in Arizona or any shot of taking back the House could disappear. And right now, taking back the House is a matter of unprecedented importance. As a former Secretary of State and proud American, I refuse to stand on the sidelines as our shared American ideals are threatened by a chaotic administration with misplaced values. **Let me be clear:** Our nation is at a critical juncture, and while we might sometimes feel powerless to create change -- [_**change is possible and we can make it happen right now by chipping in $25 or more to help elect Tom O 'Halleran.**_](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.04_b2_jk_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Tom understands that the integrity of our Democratic values is worth fighting for. And that's why I'm urging you to support him. **You can chip in to Tom 's campaign by clicking this link:** **[http://action.tomohalleran.com/help-tom](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.04_b2_jk_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** When we see our country drifting down the wrong path, it's the duty of each and every one of us to take action. But time is running out. **Election Day is 5 days away and the fate of our country will be determined by what we do right now to support leaders like Tom.** **I 'm counting on you to rush a donation today -- your support could make the difference on Election Night:** **[http://action.tomohalleran.com/help-tom](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.04_b2_jk_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thank you, John Kerry | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.01_b1_jk_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****

Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
