name: Team NHGOP
subject: You're Needed at the Polls
body:
**Sunday Afternoon, 11/04/2018** Derek, As of this email, we are**just 2 days** away from **Election Day 2018.** It's important to make sure our polling locations throughout the Granite State show a great presence for Republican campaigns, as well as party-designated poll challengers who assist in maintaining the integrity of our elections. We have established an [NHGOP Submission Form](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBl5S95iDKOpGx8O6ixPT6Z-2BlIykRyRQiD4SgNEhPMS1_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MhFFWZMk-2FGT0179xT5VlkE1AEQIp2tcJVn2YgbD-2FQAVP-2Fcp2-2FKfK8Y-2Fde2WMOk82KL4LKn7CmlLsmJddfuV7GciaiWMkW6UsFkHPR5tYNHyrQXXS51ynxYAmg2okxqzhyyfEIANlbJ1TgPqrEMekEczH0sjlXBYQ0aCCy65nyyY2X6wboGy7f1Z0pr-2FMCrDOquF1QW5sgfSFUDOJTDu8qlKwg-2FwMguROmjvZECo64jwEroxkSaG9-2BiOWqgxTy7b6yO-2Fti45FRNx-2BN3QDMNaHeQw-3D-3D), which will allow our top-of-the-ticket campaigns to work with our local GOP committees on filling spots where needed across New Hampshire. On the webpage [NH.GOP/election-day](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBl5S95iDKOpGx8O6ixPT6Z-2BlIykRyRQiD4SgNEhPMS1_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MhFFWZMk-2FGT0179xT5VlkE1AEQIp2tcJVn2YgbD-2FQAVP-2Fcp2-2FKfK8Y-2Fde2WMOk82KL4LKn7CmlLsmJddfuV7GcgacNwS4LDSiSor89-2FzaJLTAbrs0tuTf7TJicZwuhKhP-2Fxzqr2-2FEzGrTbusK0SHo2eF2QBLc-2BwVepPJiMFO35yyFA-2FHJzScel8N8Ocr5WEF8Xyv-2BR7jy66mSeFaQoWgciUbSL3qSmY8KC83tCmqhnLX9fN1siviiKUpk-2B9RQCBBk4UWBADfRG8PxB5CMnJ0M2Q-3D-3D) you will find a form to fill out when you want to sign up for shifts for both activities, as well as a downloadable Microsoft Excel sheet template you can complete and email in order to submit multiple volunteers to our tracker. Together, we will secure victory up and down the ballot for New Hampshire Republicans! Let's close this cycle out strong. ****Sincerely, Team NHGOP _**Below, please find addresses for our major campaign offices - these offices can be used to pick up Election Day signs from now until the election.**_ | |

name: Bob Corney, Bredesen Campaign Manager
subject: the most powerful get-out-the-vote operation Tennessee has ever seen
body:
|
#
Peter, we’ve already told you quite a bit about the record-breaking turnout from Early Vote, **but I wanted to share one other number with you real quick that’s been grabbing some attention:** Thanks to the support of Taylor Swift, some have been describing this as the “Swift Lift” -- but I know it’s more than that. Young and first-time voters know just how important this race is to get things done for our state and our country. **And thanks to your help, we’ve built the most powerful get-out-the-vote operation Tennessee has ever seen.** Now Tennesseans from every background are coming together to make calls, knock on doors, and get voters the resources and information they need for Election Day. Can we count on your help to keep up this momentum into Tuesday? **Chip in $10 or whatever you can before Monday night’s deadline to help us get out the vote on Election Day. You only have a few days left to make a difference for our campaign -- we hope we can count on your help.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | ******[Chip in $10 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3019792/19853179/-1207524935?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODQwMzc1MS05YWUwLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q8iVoKRiRLCdll5RrCnrWDNr2VElCAU5LGuuDHzKTXk=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em181104-turnout&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)******

clean_body: | Peter, we’ve already told you quite a bit about the record-breaking turnout from Early Vote, but I wanted to share one other number with you real quick that’s been grabbing some attention: Thanks to the support of Taylor Swift, some have been describing this as the “Swift Lift” -- but I know it’s more than that. Young and first-time voters know just how important this race is to get things done for our state and our country. And thanks to your help, we’ve built the most powerful get-out-the-vote operation Tennessee has ever seen. Now Tennesseans from every background are coming together to make calls, knock on doors, and get voters the resources and information they need for Election Day. Can we count on your help to keep up this momentum into Tuesday? Chip in $10 or whatever you can before Monday night’s deadline to help us get out the vote on Election Day. You only have a few days left to make a difference for our campaign -- we hope we can count on your help. name: betofortexas.com
subject: The new voters that will win this election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

The latest poll has Beto tied with Ted Cruz. But here’s a statistic that
none of the pollsters could have predicted: 7.8%. That’s the percentage of
early votes cast by Texans who registered to vote in 2018. These are the
new voters -- hundreds of thousands of people who normally don’t show up
in midterm elections -- who are going to win this race for Beto.

If we have a strong Election Day showing from these newly-registered
voters, Beto can win this election in a historic upset. But we need to
increase funding for our get-out-the-vote ads and field program. Right
now, we’re running behind on our $3.5 million goal to win:

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181104&t=1019&akid=24267%2E444211%2EQPDtXO ]Can we count on you to chip in
right now to help us reach our FINAL goal? All contributions from emails
like this one go straight into getting more votes for Beto.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181104&t=1020&akid=24267%2E444211%2EQPDtXO ]Contribute
$3
»

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181104&t=1021&akid=24267%2E444211%2EQPDtXO ]Beto for Texas

We can see the energy here on the ground: the volunteer enthusiasm, yard
signs everywhere and massive rallies for our campaign. Beto is inspiring
so many people who don’t normally get involved to step up. They’re voting
and volunteering at unprecedented levels.

That’s why this election will almost certainly come down to an extremely
thin margin. We need to make sure no voter is left behind.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181104&t=1022&akid=24267%2E444211%2EQPDtXO ]Contribute
$3
right now to boost our final get-out-the-vote efforts.

Nobody thought Beto would come this far, but our volunteers and donors
have shocked the entire country with your commitment. Thank you for
everything you’ve given so far.

Team Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181104&t=1023&akid=24267%2E444211%2EQPDtXO ]Contribute
$3
»

name: Team Scholten Volunteers
subject: 🚨 URGENT ALERT 🚨 (not for money)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
We need your help, Peter.
If we want to win this race, if we want to replace a Congressman that continually embarrasses us with one that we can be proud of, we need your help.
We don’t have enough people to canvass all the doors we need to hit in the next 48 hours, and we urgently need your help to get it done.
Take a look at the images above. This isn’t just critically important work,**it’s fun too!**
So help out tomorrow. Help out on Tuesday. We have turfs cut and lit ready to roll, and most of our offices have pretty good snacks to keep you fueled up as you go. If you've never canvassed before, it's easy to get started and we have plenty of people on hand to offer support.
Just sign up here: [**_https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/iowa/_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3020602/19865697/-1218806182?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmQ1MTAxNC1hOGUwLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rz0XtVt5gqe752hLCnUiJxC7zJmivoV-eS_AvR0j-PA=) to get started!
And if you’re not in the district and want to help, you can sign up to join our remote phone bank team here: [**_https://www.scholten4iowa.com/volunteer/_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3020603/19865698/-1873742259?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmQ1MTAxNC1hOGUwLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rz0XtVt5gqe752hLCnUiJxC7zJmivoV-eS_AvR0j-PA=).
**We’re on the verge of making history. Let’s not let this opportunity get away from us!**
Thank you for being a part of this incredible movement.
Standing Tall for All,
Team Scholten Volunteers

Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
Scholten4Iowa
P.O. Box 3531

clean_body: We need your help, Peter. If we want to win this race, if we want to replace a Congressman that continually embarrasses us with one that we can be proud of, we need your help. We don’t have enough people to canvass all the doors we need to hit in the next 48 hours, and we urgently need your help to get it done. Take a look at the images above. This isn’t just critically important work,it’s fun too! So help out tomorrow. Help out on Tuesday. We have turfs cut and lit ready to roll, and most of our offices have pretty good snacks to keep you fueled up as you go. If you've never canvassed before, it's easy to get started and we have plenty of people on hand to offer support. Just sign up here: = to get started! And if you’re not in the district and want to help, you can sign up to join our remote phone bank team here: =. We’re on the verge of making history. Let’s not let this opportunity get away from us! Thank you for being a part of this incredible movement. Standing Tall for All, Team Scholten Volunteers Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee Scholten4Iowa P.O. | Friend, Last night we all set our clocks back for daylight saving time and it made me think about Election Day. **If we lose this Tuesday, we will all set our clocks back to 2007, when Nancy Pelosi became Speaker of the House and our economy fell apart.** Friday’s jobs numbers show our economy is finally booming again. If we want to continue the economic growth we have seen over the past 2 years, we can't go back to Pelosi’s failed approach. **Wages are up, taxes are down, and business are growing again.** **I hope you will help this Tuesday to keep it going.** While I am grateful for the widespread support I have received so far, my latest poll numbers show your vote will be the difference between winning and losing. **That's why all dedicated conservatives MUST vote on Tuesday, November 6th -- because the direction of our country will drastically change, for the worse, if radical liberals outnumber us at the polls.** [You can find your voting location here.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMDE3NTYzMDUyMjU5Njc3Njg4JmM9cTdjOCZlPTE5MjgmYj0yMTE3MzcwOTImZD16MnM4czJm.jZkYX-CF-TdoBRR2Sm_DlA73al58nx8USx2TCJieBEg)
